tuning: E A D G B E

recommended.song_name: Have You Ever Seen The Rain

content:
Capo on 4

I believe the most prominent part of the accompaniment is actually a mandolin, but 
that is the part I was trying to emulate when I made this tab. This sounds the 
most like the recording that I can come up with, unless you want to learn the 
mandolin, and have someone else play guitar.


[Intro]
[ch]D[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch]   [ch]A7sus4[/ch] [ch]A7sus4[/ch]
[ch]D[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch]

[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]        [ch]G[/ch]        [ch]D[/ch]                 [ch]G[/ch]
 You and me, we come from diff'rent worlds.[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]            [ch]G[/ch]                  [ch]D[/ch]             [ch]G[/ch]
 You like to laugh at me when I look at other girls.[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                 [ch]G[/ch]     [ch]D[/ch]               [ch]G[/ch]
 Sometimes you're crazy  and you wonder why[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]           [ch]G[/ch]               [ch]D[/ch]                [ch]G[/ch]
 I'm such a baby 'cause the dolphins make me cry.[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]              [ch]Em7[/ch]               [ch]G[/ch]
Well, there's nothing I can do.[/tab]
[tab]                                  [ch]D[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch]
I've been looking for a girl like you.[/tab]

[Verse 2]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]             [ch]G[/ch]           [ch]D[/ch]               [ch]G[/ch]
  You look at me, you got nothing left to say.[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]             [ch]G[/ch]            [ch]D[/ch]             [ch]G[/ch]
  I moan and pout at you until I get my way.[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]         [ch]G[/ch]      [ch]D[/ch]            [ch]G[/ch]
  I won't dance,   you won't sing.[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                [ch]G[/ch]                 [ch]D[/ch]               [ch]G[/ch]
  I just want to love you, but you want to wear my ring.[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]              [ch]Em7[/ch]               [ch]G[/ch]
Well, there's nothing I can do.[/tab]
[tab]                     [ch]D[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch]
I only wanna be with you.[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Em7[/ch]               [ch]A7sus4[/ch]
You can call me your fool,[/tab]
[tab]                     [ch]D[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch]
I only wanna be with you.[/tab]

[tab][ch]D[/ch]              [ch]G[/ch]                   [ch]D[/ch]              [ch]G[/ch]
